en.name: Lake Hora
en.description: Crater lake surrounded by resorts and cultural sites, famous for hosting annual cultural and religious events (Irreecha).
en.details: Lake Hora is one of the most famous lakes in Bishoftu, hosting traditional and cultural festivals.

am.name: ሐይቁ ሆራ
am.description: ባህላዊ ቦታዎችና ሪዞርቶች የተሸፈነ ክረትር ሐይቅ፣ እንዲሁም አመታዊ ባህላዊ እና ሃይማኖታዊ ክስተቶችን የሚያካትት።
am.details: ሐይቁ ሆራ በቢሾፍቱ ውስጥ ከፍተኛ ታዋቂ ሐይቅ ነው። ባህላዊ እና ባህላዊ ክስተቶችን ይያዛል።

or.name: Lake Hora
or.description: Laga crater kan naannoo resort fi bakka aadaa waliin qabdu, ayyaana aadaa fi amantii waggaa tokko tokkoof beekamtu.
or.details: Laga Hora Bishoftu keessatti beekamtuudha, ayyaana aadaa fi aadaa biyya keessa ni qabdi.

en.name: Lake Babogaya
en.description: Peaceful freshwater lake ideal for relaxation.
en.details: Lake Babogaya is a scenic freshwater lake north of Bishoftu. Known for birdwatching and sunset views, it’s perfect for nature lovers.

am.name: ሐይቁ ባቦጋያ
am.details: ሐይቁ ባቦጋያ በቢሾፍቱ ሰሜን የሚገኝ ትልቅ የውኃ ሐይቅ ነው። የወፎች መመልከትና የማታ ምስሎች ዕይታ ለፍቅር የተሻለ ቦታ ነው።

or.name: Lake Babogaya
or.details: Laga Babogaya Bishoftu kaabaa jira. Laga bishaan qulqulluu fi bakka simbirroota ilaaluuf beekamaa dha. Namoota uumama jaalattan biratti mijataa dha.

en.name: Lake Arsedi
en.description: Historic crater lake with steep surroundings.
en.details: Lake Arsedi is a crater lake in southern Bishoftu with steep slopes around it. Ideal for hiking, photography, and enjoying scenic views.

am.name: ሐይቁ አርሴዲ
am.description: ታሪካዊ ክረትር ሐይቅ ከፍተኛ ቦታዎች ጋር።
am.details: ሐይቁ አርሴዲ በቢሾፍቱ ደቡብ ያለ ትልቅ ክረትር ሐይቅ ነው። ለመራመድ፣ ለፎቶግራፊ እና ለእይታዎች ተስማሚ ቦታ ነው።

or.name: Lake Arsedi
or.description: Laga crater seenaa qabu, daandii fiigichaa fi suura kaasuuf mijataa.
or.details: Laga Arsedi Bishoftu kibbaatti argama, daandii fiigichaa fi suura kaasuuf mijataa dha. Naannoo isaa cimaan jiru.

en.name: Lake Chelekleka
en.description: Shallow seasonal wetland famous for migratory birds.
en.details: Lake Chelekleka is a shallow seasonal lake west of Bishoftu, known for flamingos, pelicans, and other migratory birds.

am.name: ሐይቁ ቼሌክሌካ
am.description: የወለላ ወፎችን የሚያሳይ ዝቅተኛ የወቅታዊ ሐይቅ።
am.details: ሐይቁ ቼሌክሌካ በቢሾፍቱ ምዕራብ ያለ ዝቅተኛ የወቅታዊ ሐይቅ ነው። ፍላሚንጎ ፣ ፔሊካንና ሌሎች ወፎች እዚህ ላይ ይገኛሉ።

or.name: Lake Chelekleka
or.description: Laga shalloo yeroo muraasaa kan simbirroo imaluuf beekamu.
or.details: Laga Chelekleka Bishoftu dhiyaa jiru, flamingoo, pelikaan fi simbirroota imaluuf beekamaa dha.

en.name: Local Market Cultural Tour
en.description: Authentic Ethiopian market experience with local goods.
en.details: Explore traditional crafts, local products, and authentic Ethiopian culture. Interact with local artisans and learn about traditional practices.

am.name: የአካባቢ ገበያ ባህላዊ ጉብኝት
am.description: ባህላዊ እና የኢትዮጵያ ምርቶች የተሞላ ተሞክሮ።
am.details: ባህላዊ እና የኢትዮጵያ ምርቶችን ያሳዩ እና ከአካባቢ አርቲስቶች ጋር ይገናኙ።

or.name: Local Market Cultural Tour
or.description: Aadaa fi oomisha naannoo beekamaa baradhu.
or.details: Aadaa fi oomisha naannoo beekamaa baradhu, akkasumas aadaa dhugaa Itoophiyaa baradhu.

en.name: Bishoftu Tour Guides Association
en.description: Professional local guides for authentic experiences.
en.details: Experienced guides offering personalized tours including cultural immersion, adventure hikes, and historical site visits.

am.name: የቢሾፍቱ መሪዎች ማህበር
am.details: ባለሙያ መሪዎች የግል ጉዞዎችን እና ባህላዊ ስራዎችን ያቀርባሉ።

or.name: Bishoftu Tour Guides Association
or.description: Ogeeyyii naannoo beekamaa hojii dhugaa waliin qindeessu.
or.details: Ogeeyyii tajaajila dhuunfaa, bashannana fi bakka seenaa waliin qindeessu.

en.name: Ethiopia Adventure Travel Co.
en.details: Offering customized packages including mountain expeditions, cultural tours, and luxury experiences.

am.name: የኢትዮጵያ የጉዞ አገልግሎት ኩባንያ
am.details: በተለያዩ ጉዞ ጥቅሎች የተሞላ ፕላን ያቀርባል።

or.name: Ethiopia Adventure Travel Co.
or.description: Ogeeyyii bashannanaa fi imalaa adda addaa.
or.details: Bakka fiigichaa, aadaa fi bashannanaa adda addaa qopheessu.
